creator: steven.hartland@multiplay.co.uk
text:
Added sysctl's for ixgbe all tunables

Wired up hw.ixgbe.flow_control (was never used)

Added hw.ixgbe.advertise_speed which allows /boot/loader.conf to configure advertised speed as sysctl.conf is too late for network changes.

Made enable_aim device independent based on hw.ixgbe.enable_aim as a default.

Fix: 

Apply the attached patch
How-To-Repeat: N/A
